category_sources: Official docs https://python-ly.readthedocs.io/ describe Python modules and CLI for LilyPond documents.
source_facts.description: Parse, manipulate or create documents in LilyPond format
display_name_sources: Official documentation https://python-ly.readthedocs.io/ uses python-ly as the project name.

docs_sources: Official GitHub README links to the online documentation.
Official Read the Docs site provides command, server, and package documentation.
repo_sources: Official repository README states the development homepage is https://github.com/frescobaldi/python-ly.
tags_sources: Official docs describe the ly CLI and Python modules for LilyPond files.
